stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Ignoring any change in altitude (not significant), an aircraft is flying with autopilot engaged, idle power set, and using pitch to control speed. How will MCRIT (Critical Mach Number) change according to the positions on the diagram above?

options.a: MCRIT will decrease between positions 3 and 4 due to decreasing AoA.
options.b: MCRIT is constant at positions 1 and 4, considering that mass is the same at these positions.
options.c: MCRIT is constant at positions 2 and 3, due to a decrease in Mach Number.
options.d: MCRIT is constant from positions 1 to 2, and another MCRIT is constant from positions 3 to 4.
